title: Service Entry Point
description: FastAPI server on port 8106. All scraping, analysis, and export endpoints are registered here. Also loads env config and starts the background scheduler.

title: Data Models & Schemas
description: SQLAlchemy ORM models define the database schema. Pydantic models define the API contract for requests and responses.

title: Scraping Engine
description: Multi-layer scraping with proxy rotation and site-specific extraction. Falls back through HTTP → Playwright → JSON-LD → Vision AI analysis.

title: Service Layer: Auth, Cache, Billing
description: API key management (scp_ prefix), usage tracking and monthly billing, product caching with 24h TTL. Orchestrates scrapes with full audit trail.

title: Analysis Pipeline
description: Normalizes raw scraped data from various sources (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok), enriches with AI, downloads product images for TUS.

title: Scheduling & Export
description: Background scheduler checks every 60s for due scrape jobs. Export service pushes product data to Google Sheets via Service Account.
